author: Egeria
title: Peregrinatio ad loca sancta Egeriae
editions: CSEL 39, 37-101; CC 175, 32-106 and 175 = Indices; H. Petre, Ethfrie: Journal de voyage (Latin text, French Introduction and translation) SC 21 (Paris 1948) and P. Maraval, trans., SC 296 (Paris 1982); ET J. Wilkinson, Egeria’s Travels (London 1971 and 2nd ed., Jerusalem 1981); also, G.E. Gingras, Egeria: Diary of a Pilgrimage, ACW 38 (New York 1970).
